brand.name: De-coder
brand.tagline: Transform source code into human-readable knowledge

landing.heroTitle: Understand any codebase, in your language, at your level
landing.heroSubtitle: Open-source. Bring your own AI key. Cloud or fully local.
landing.feature1Body: English, Italiano, 简体中文 — switch any time.
landing.feature2Body: OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, OpenRouter — or local with Ollama / LM Studio.
landing.feature3Body: In Local mode, your source code never leaves your machine.

auth.title: Sign in to De-coder
auth.subtitle: Email/password, Google, or continue locally.
auth.githubNote: GitHub OAuth login isn't available in this build yet.
auth.switchToSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account.

dashboard.title: Your projects
dashboard.empty: You don't have any projects yet.

project.noRepos: No repositories yet. Upload a ZIP or import from GitHub to get started.
project.githubOnlyPublic: Only public repositories are supported in this build.

workspace.selectFile: Select a file to view its source
workspace.localPledge: Local mode — source code stays on your machine.
workspace.noProvider: Add an API key in Settings to enable AI explanations.

analysis.needsCloud: Code analysis requires a cloud provider in this build.
analysis.empty: Run an analysis to see findings here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.byokIntro: De-coder never stores your keys in plain text. Your code is never used for training.
settings.localIntro: Local mode runs entirely in your browser against your localhost. Source code never reaches our servers.

admin.title: Administration
admin.intro: Promote or demote administrators. Bootstrap the first admin via the SQL helper documented in the README.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.intro: De-coder turns source code into human-readable knowledge. Read this page in your language using the switcher in the header.
docs.gettingStartedBody: Sign in, create a project, upload a ZIP or import any public GitHub repository, pick a file in the tree, then click Explain. Choose your proficiency level and human or technical summary.
docs.byokBody: In Settings → AI providers, paste a key for OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini or OpenRouter. Keys are encrypted with AES-256-GCM server-side and decrypted only to forward your request — they are never returned to the browser.
docs.localBody: Install Ollama (https://ollama.com) or LM Studio, then in Settings → Local AI endpoints add the base URL (Ollama: http://localhost:11434, LM Studio: http://localhost:1234) and a default model. The browser calls your machine directly — source code never reaches our servers.
docs.securityBody: You own your code, generated documentation and suggested comments. We never train on user repositories. Every database table uses Row-Level Security scoped to your account.

errors.zipTooLarge: The ZIP file is too large.
errors.noFiles: No readable files found in the ZIP.

footer.ownership: Your code and generated documentation belong to you. De-coder never trains on your repositories.
